title: Ricky Bibey
extract: Ricky Bibey (22 September 1981 – 16 July 2022) was an English professional rugby league footballer who played as a prop or second-row. He made his professional debut in 2001 for Wigan Warriors, and went on to play for Leigh Centurions, St Helens, Oldham and Wakefield Trinity Wildcats before being forced to retire in 2012 due to injury. He also represented England A, making three appearances for the team in 2002.
